description: Docusaurus is an open-source static site generator focused on documentation sites, blogs, and other React-based websites. The docusaurus.io domain primarily hosts project documentation for using and extending the framework.
summary: Docusaurus exposes a public npm-based CLI (`docusaurus` / `create-docusaurus`) with no authentication; no public hosted HTTP, GraphQL, or MCP integration surface was found on docusaurus.io.
